column6: 我们把屏幕上那些食材准备好。把蒜片拿回来，稍微冲一下水，不要冲得太干净。用盐和料酒码味。锅里稍微多倒点油，把刚才那些佐料放进去炒一下；佐料炒香后把料渣捞出来，油留在锅里。油再次烧热后把蒜片倒进去炒到变色，再把刚才炒好的配菜倒进去，一起翻炒两三分钟，加盐、糖、海鲜酱油调味，就可以起锅了。因为我们家里的火不大。

column7: They have a construction team with more than ten years of experience, and they are professional and responsible. As for materials, furniture, and home appliances, there is even less to worry about: this huge stand-alone building has three full floors of factory flagship stores, with manufacturers directly stationed there. They are all top-tier brands, and there are tens of thousands of products to choose from. The third floor even has a 3,000-square-meter custom factory showroom, so your home can be as personalized as you want. On top of that, the current home expo deals are really strong. A renovation effect that would usually cost two or three hundred thousand yuan might be done this time for around one hundred twenty to one hundred thirty thousand. So anyone who needs to renovate soon can come and take a look.

column7: I wonder whether you also have memories of that shop from your school days: Bifengtang. It was cheap and tasty, and in summer I would basically go there for a drink every day. My favorite was definitely their grass jelly drink. Even now, at seven yuan a cup, it still feels like a great deal and very cheap, and there are a lot of ingredients in it. This coconut drink had coconut and cassia seed; I forget whether it was six or seven yuan a cup. A large cup of freshly squeezed watermelon juice was ten yuan, and having one in summer was really refreshing. Then there was the five-yuan double-skin milk pudding. I really loved that double-skin milk pudding and often ate it as a meal. I took that cup home, so my ……

The meat in the taro chicken is basically from the parts near the bone joints, but do not think the taro has no flavor just because it looks that way. It is actually very flavorful, and it is stewed until very soft. At the end, there are also chicken offal and chicken blood soup. I think the chicken offal is a little too cold, but the chicken blood soup is pretty good, and the chicken blood tastes really tender.

column7: We climbed up hills and stairs to eat chicken. Today we came to Tuwan'er for their 'one chicken, four ways.' This place also requires booking in advance; otherwise, if you come directly to the store, you may have to wait two hours. They weigh one chicken for you and then prepare it in four different ways. Their signature dish is sliced poached chicken, and they cut it really thin. I really admire their knife skills. The dipping sauce is indeed very fragrant, and after we finished eating, we even packed the sauce to take away. There is also the spicy peppercorn chicken. The chicken skin has that bouncy, chewy texture and is still quite fragrant. But I think...

column7: I have always thought food lovers are the greatest inventors in the world. Adding beef, pork intestines, or peas-and-minced-meat topping to Chongqing-style noodles is one thing, but now even tofu pudding has not been spared. That is right, today I came to eat tofu pudding noodles. At this place, I ordered the noodles with fried minced-meat sauce and tofu pudding, and the noodles with pork intestines and tofu pudding. The tofu pudding is very tender. It is the kind that people who are not very good with chopsticks, like me, cannot pick up, so you can only eat it with a spoon. It feels just like eating soft tofu pudding. As for the noodles, the flavor is a little above average.

column6: 你请我吃了那么多顿饭，今天我也请你吃顿自助吧。快走快走！我的大胃王朋友今天请我吃了一家全重庆性价比最高的自助餐，只要三块钱。什么藕丁、黄瓜、四季豆、萝卜丝、豆干、苦瓜，还有各种各样的凉菜，多达十几种菜品随便吃不限量。唯一限制就是稀饭只能吃一碗。三块钱你买不了吃亏买不了上当，但是你可以吃一顿自助餐。好了，我实在是编不下去了，今天又是被大胃王朋友套路的一天。
column7: You’ve treated me to so many meals, so today it's my turn to treat you to a buffet! Let’s go, let's go! My 'big eater' friend took me to the most budget-friendly buffet in all of Chongqing today—it only costs 3 RMB! We're talking lotus root, cucumbers, green beans, shredded radish, dried tofu, bitter melon, and all kinds of cold dishes. Over a dozen options, all-you-can-eat, no limits! The only catch is you can only have one bowl of congee. For three bucks, you literally have nothing to lose, but you do get a whole buffet! ...Alright, I can’t keep making this up anymore. Another day of getting played by my 'big eater' friend.
